tasks.goal: Design Python API client retry logic with exponential backoff and jitter for rate limits and transient failures.
current_context: The current client already uses Python API client retry logic for rate limits and transient failures with fixed delay.
Avoid selecting another note that just repeats the same fixed-delay guidance.

candidates.text: Design Python API client retry logic for rate limits and transient failures with fixed delay.
Exponential backoff with jitter helps Python clients survive 429 rate limits and transient failures.
API clients should log request IDs for traceability.
